title: Create: More Builds
description: More Build's Themed on create and other addons
body:
# Create: More Builds
**WARNING!! This Mod Only Works With Create 6.0.4 or higher**
>
> Our Mod Shares Team's Build's Made with create and a lot of time 
> Our Team Wants you to explore everything you will find
>
> The Mod adds new Buildings naturally generated 
> For Now only 3 But there will be more :3
>  
>
> PS. we suggest you look at the cherry house
